name: Munching Peanut Brittle/MW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1½-quart bowl, stir together the sugar and corn syrup.
2. Microwave on high for 4 minutes.
3. Stir in the peanuts. Microwave on high for 3 to 5 more minutes, until light brown.
4. Add the butter and vanilla to the syrup, blending well. Microwave at high for an additional 1 to 2 minutes.
5. The peanuts will be slightly browned and the syrup very hot. Add the baking soda and gently stir until light and foamy.
6. Pour the mixture onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
7. Let cool for half an hour to one hour.
8. When cool, break into small pieces and store in an air-tight container.
